name: Crochet Keychain
description: Handmade crochet keychain — lightweight, cute, and giftable.
details: Each keychain is crocheted by hand using soft acrylic yarn, then stuffed lightly and finished with a sturdy metal keyring. No two are exactly alike — small variations in colour and shape are part of what makes them special. Great as a bag charm, gift, or little treat for yourself.
materials: Acrylic yarn, polyester stuffing, metal keyring

reviews.name: Sophie T.
reviews.text: Absolutely adorable! Great quality and arrived really quickly. Bought one for my bag and now everyone asks where I got it.

reviews.name: Jamie L.
reviews.text: Such a sweet little thing. The colours are even nicer in person. Will definitely be ordering more as gifts.

name: Crochet Plushie
description: Soft handmade plushie made with care.
details: A squishy, huggable plushie crocheted from chunky chenille yarn — the same kind used in the product photo. Each one takes a few hours to make and is finished with safety eyes and a polyfill stuffing. Suitable for display or as a soft toy for older children (not for under 3s due to small parts).
materials: Chenille yarn, polyester stuffing, safety eyes

reviews.name: Maria K.
reviews.text: Got this as a gift for my daughter and she absolutely loves it. The chenille yarn is so soft — she carries it everywhere.

reviews.name: Alex R.
reviews.text: Really well made and super cute. Took about 2 weeks to arrive but worth the wait!

name: Postcard Pack
description: A set of postcards collected from a trip abroad.
details: A small bundle of postcards picked up during travels — from museums, local shops, and market stalls. Each pack contains 4–6 cards from the same trip or region. Great for decorating, journaling, or actually sending to someone.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: Such a lovely set! I used them to decorate my journal. Really unique illustrations you wouldn't find in a regular shop.

name: Souvenir Bracelet
description: A colorful bracelet sourced from another country.
details: A woven friendship-style bracelet sourced from a local market abroad. Colourful, lightweight, and adjustable. Each one comes with a small card noting where it was found. Stock is limited and won't be restocked once sold — when it's gone, it's gone.
